chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ الْأَبَوَيْنِ مَعَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأَبٍ وَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأُمٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Inheritance of the two parents with the brothers and sisters of the father, and the brothers and sisters of the mother

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/141)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْإِخْوَةَ مِنَ الْأُمِّ لَا يَحْجُبُونَ الْأُمَّ عَنِ الثُّلُثِ .

en.hubeali: And by his chain, from Ibn Fazal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying that the sister of the mother would not be barring the mother from the third’.
en.sarwar: 6. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has narrated the following: “I once heard abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ’Brothers from the mothers’ side do not bar the mother from one-third of the legacy.’”
